name: Tenbillion Table Tennis - Ping Pong VR

reviews.review_description:
Game physics has to be improved, when you compare real life table tennis to this game it doesn't feel the same at all .the racket is misaligned with the hand. I know you can reset it in the settings but its hard to align it without having to do it multiple times. And the game has glitches. Sometimes the ball phases 
through the racket like its a gas or something.
If you want your game to be successful,
You have to make it worth the success at first.
But! I had a good time playing it, but i would enjoy it more if it got fixed and improved it's physics! Also the height changer button is on the right thumbstick, so its normal if you grew up 10 inches while rallying 😊

When I entered the game I wanted to play multiplayed But when I tried it told me to beat the ai first but it wouldn't let me serve and it was impossible to win since I couldn't even hit the ball since the ai was too fast and very unfair I don't recommend playing it if you want a nice family game Or with a friend.

I rarely write reviews but this one i must give credit where it deserves. I play table tennis irl, this one feels exactly like you are playing for real, physics is great and smooth, I bought 11TT thinking to get an upgrade, but was totally disappointed, they couldn't even do the sound right, the physics felt so off I quickly uninstalled and stayed with this one. The only problem is sometimes the server is down so can't play, I hope they can make it playable offline. Thanks for the great sim and keep up the good work.

reviews.review_title: Quest pro controllers don’t work in game
reviews.review_description: I just to play this game a lot and enjoyed it but I upgraded to the quest pro controllers and now I can’t toss the ball open the menu or change position be nice to see a fix
Game so horrible glitch

good simulation but compared to the real game it makes a big difference. Many times while I am going to hit the ball for the reason that the camera sees the movement of my hand too low so that I cannot repel the opponent's attack

In order to play against real people, it says you have to beat the bot first. However, the bot is literally impossible to score on. Don’t even say it’s a skill issue, it is quite literally impossible. It teleports right to my ball no matter where it is. Please fix

reviews.review_title: Cannot play offline. Contact the develop
reviews.review_description: Love this game. Mirroring is really fun.Tried clearing storage data, still cannot  play without internet.Thankyou.
i love it 👍🏽
You should be ashamed to even make this horrible game
It made me  instantly  start floating up into the sky unable to move i couldnt even get past the tutorial. Im meta quest 3s

developer_response.body:
This problem is caused by controller drift (a known hardware issue with the thumbstick). Please refer to the following official Meta support page for assistance. This is not an issue with our app.
https://www.meta.com/help/quest/5545675425557880/

reviews.review_title: Fun to play and will give you an idea
reviews.review_description: Fun to play and it will give you an idea if you want to advance to the one for $15 table tennis training simulator. Biggest problem with that one is you pay $15 and the AI robot even on the easy settings slams it back to you. So be sure and do the trial on ttt simulator.

The game is good but in the ai match is bad.Whenever I serve the ai gets the point even tho I served good and then he magically gets the point I deserve.And don’t respond saying about how to do it because I do it and then it doesn’t work.Please fix the ai.
The game is super fun and helpful for learning table tennis , the multi-player is a bit laggy but the people you meet are really nice , the ai is kind of dumb though but who cares anyway
It mid
This game is really fun and people are really nice this game is a MUST.
Its awful if you hit the ball of the table the ai will just stare at the balll

this is SO CHEAP IN QUALITY. also don't get me S T A R T E D on the bot. the bot is LITTERALLY IMPOSSIBLE to score on. And it kept breaking down. like I was playing with my friend then he recommended me to play. TOTAL SCAM. Wish i could rate 0 stars...
This game is so bad. Don’t buy
the ball was laggy and the game was as well
Love the fact that its free but when I was setting it up I accidentally didn't allow access to my mic does anyone know how to give it access after setting it up?
The game is perfect its free

I love this game, especially for free. The physics feel like you’re actually playing so you can get pretty competitive. The feel of it may take a little getting used to but you’ll catch on pretty quick. I honestly work up a sweat playing this game. 

The AI opponent is pretty fun but the only real issue is sometimes there aren’t enough other people online to play with. The corners/edges of the table could be configured a little better too. Overall this game is a blast would definitely recommend for new or experienced VR users.

I don't know if it is due to the last update of the Meta OS, but I feel some lag in the multiplayer matches, specially when moving the head. The performance was better two months ago.
Update May 2025: again it runs smoothly, thanks!

reviews.review_title: Good, but ball is too bouncy
reviews.review_description:
Honestly, the amount of 1 star reviews are from ages ago when (I assume) bugs were present. There are little-to-no bugs and the physics are pretty good.

Only thing is the ball is too bouncy to be considered realistic. Still fun and worth the play, got my friend hooked.

I played this game for an hour and didnt have a good experience at all. I was told that i needed to beat the ai before i can do multiplayer but i couldn't even do that. Every time it was my serve i was never allowed to hit the ball whenni served it and immediately gave the point to the ai. Don't recommend this game to anyone who loves ping pong

developer_response.body: The toss must be at least 16 cm high and within 30 degrees. Please check the image of the serve rules displayed on the AI level selection screen. It seems that your toss during the serve might be either too low or too angled.

reviews.review_description: Great game, good physics and it's free. A lot of options, AI and multiplayer mode. It's a must have! Last update with serve rules is the best update
It's really fun against bots because it doesn't lag and it has mixed reality. Against other people it's really laggy.
It’s free and pretty fun. Not sure why it’s not closer to 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: The best TT sim in VR
reviews.review_description:
After owning and playing the main competitor game 11TT for close to a decade, I have to say that playing this is such a breath of fresh air. Finally a game that actually tries to deliver on realistic TT physics and regularly updating and improving the game to achieve this goal. 

Obviously the UI needs some work but I'd rather take superb physics over UI every day of the week.
yayyy

I was not expecting to be blown away by a free ping pong game with a mid rating. 

At first look it seems you fired up windows 98, however as soon as i hopped in to the ai and hit the first spin return and watched it move and react like it actually should i was shocked. 

The amount of “No way” going through my head. 

This game is phenomenal

This game is okay for what it's trying to be. The UI feels pretty dated and the game play is bare-bones. But the core gameplay plays good and feels good. With other options out there this game I think can easily be overlooked. But for the price of this game, it's worth giving a shot if you just want to play a quick game or see if Ping Pong is your type of thing you want to invest time / money into in VR.

This game is the best. I play ping pong at my school, and since I got the VR, life became more fun with this game. I give it a 5 star. Please have more updates where you can customise the ping pong ball for free, or do challenges such as reaching a specific amount of rank. I would love to have some mini games, like beer pong where you can throw or serve the ping pong ball into a cup. You can find more ideas on pongfinity's YouTube channel, they get A lot of requests that seem very fun for this game.

It would be cool if I could play with my friends, cuz I can win or lose against strangers and AI, but the win is empty if I can't then rub it in the face of my opponent, or adversely have to deal with the shame of a loss as my friends gloat about their ping pong prowess. I'd even pay for a multiplayer option.
Best game I have ever played uuuhhhhh

I hate this game the bot is so hard, the game gilches and now I will hate this game NERF THE BOT I LOST MORE TIMES THEN I CAN COUNT
HELP MEEEEEE

I love this! This mixed reality experience feels really precise and I'm so grateful it's free to play. I hope the game gets an offline mode so I can smack the ball around with the computer-opponent in AR when I'm away from wifi or it goes out. I am actually here to review because I love the game but my wifi went out and I can't access the settings menu to turn on the AR mode while it tries to load the online functions. Other than during an outtage I can go back and forth with the Shiba head while watching anime near perpetually at no risk of a ball smashing through my real TV, which just feels good. The physics also feel good. This game is good.
I didn't get even get started. I'm left-handed, the bat was in my right hand, and I couldn't find an option anywhere to change hands. Seems like the most basic thing missed.

developer_response.body: You can do it from 'Settings -> Racket Position -> Switch Grip'.

reviews.review_description: I have had it since it came out, it has made great progress.
When I start the game, it keeps freezing at the connecting screen forever. What should I do?

developer_response.body: It indicates that the connection to the server has failed. Please check your Wi‑Fi connection and restart the app.

reviews.review_description: Awesome game!!
It says on the store page it’s mixed reality but it isn’t 👎

developer_response.body: You can enable it from "Settings>Environment>Mixed Reality".

reviews.review_description: It’s bad

It has great physics, customization, and overall fun. If anybody says that someone is cheating or the ball is curving it’s just because their opponent was really good and put spin on the ball. Whoever says that is just bad
￼
Awesome dynamics and physics. Best in free version

When I launch the app, it places the table way beyond my reach. There's no setting to position the table. Also, I will be on the same side as the AI player! Not playable but may be teething problems.
Edit: I tried holding Meta button and the table shifted but it was at an angle ( not horizontal) I couldn't fix that. No other buttons work. Please work on table first.

developer_response.body: Press and hold the Meta button to reset the position of the table. You can also move the table by using the thumbsticks.

reviews.review_title: Great TT simulation with unique features
reviews.review_description:
I have been playing this game a lot lately to prepare for my IRL match. Based on the results of the matches, I'm pretty sure it's improving my RL skills. It's hard to imagine that it's still in the early stages of development as a free app. I find it easier to get used to the real physics in Tenbillion.

There is still some room to make it more acceptable to a wider fanbase, but as a minimum table tennis simulation, I really enjoy it. And it has some killer features like the mirror mode where you can check your moves in real time and improve your serves by actually receiving them yourself.

Please keep up the good work! I'm more than happy to pay for it already at this stage.

Play this if you want an experience where the paddle can't hit the ball, the ball teleports, the net glitches out, and the Ai partner constantly breaks down, and almost very person online is just cheating to force the ball to win without even touching your side! All in all one of the worst if not the worst game and is just a copycat, but for a small unity game I guess it has work put into it!

reviews.review_title: A Great Free Table Tennis Game
reviews.review_description: the game is amazing. only downside is that the ai is difficult and not many people are on it. heavily underrated game tho. I also just hit 1900 score :D

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We are working on making the AI's level selectable. Congratulations on achieving a 1900 score, and we would be happy if you continue playing in the future.

reviews.review_description:
Played online with a user wearing the wolf mask
 He didn't know how to serve which was funny

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and for sharing your　experience with us!

We recognize that not all players are familiar with the basic rules, like serving. We are in the process of developing a Ranked Match feature. This should make for more engaging and balanced matches.

We hope you'll continue to enjoy the game, and look forward to your continued support!

reviews.review_description: love the game just wish there was voice chat and an practice with online friends like how it is with the ai so then you could help others and help teach others techniques and i cant wait for the ai levels other than level nine to come out cause i am constantly getting beat lol and i wish we could like friend who we like playing against

developer_response.body: Thank you for your valuable feedback! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the game. For playing with friends, you can easily create a custom room by navigating to Settings -> Advanced. Also, we're excited to let you know that new AI levels are in development, offering more challenges and fun. Stay tuned for updates and thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_title: Game made my booty cheeks hurt
reviews.review_description:
Absolutely amazing my booty got eaten out by a chimpanzee

Can't say I didn't like it🤭

I tried other ping pong games that cost a lot more and the quality of the physics simulation is really not that different. I enjoy playing this game very much as it reminds me of real life ping pong which I've been away from for a while. My skills are improving everyday and I love that I'm close to the top of the leaderboard now!
The game is perfect. When tpu play and the feeling everything but for some reason my racket is small so thats a very big problem when you play

developer_response.body:
This bug has been fixed in the latest version. If the issue persists, please join our Discord and send a message to @KenRoda. Discord: https://discord.gg/5puVHn9SZd

If you can't do that, contact us at bitdojogames@gmail.com .

reviews.review_description: Great physics, lots of fun playing the AI and other random humans. Wish it had an invite feature in multiplayer so I could play with my brother in Mexico!

reviews.review_title: Enjoy playing this free underrated game
reviews.review_description: Been playing in practice mode. Just wanted to correct some misimpressions - you can easily adjust height of table, orientation, distance from the table, switch to left hand… You can even play seated. It’s not perfect, but neither are my ping pong skills. Best of all, it’s free.
I love this game so much I just wish the mirror mode got more attention like its a bit buggy that's all

This game makes no sense for beginners like the balls go thru the body and the rules doesn't match and when I throw a ball at enemy with my racket thing ofc then the ball goes thru him then he hits WTH IS THIS NONSENSE?

developer_response.body: In table tennis rules, the serve must first bounce on your own side once before bouncing on the opponent's side. You can learn how to serve by playing matches against the AI in single-player mode.  I understand your frustration.
